assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response configures weekend maintenance with --maintenance-window-start/end parameters set for Saturday 2-6 AM UTC and uses FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA for weekend recurrence

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Response includes the exact gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start "2024-02-03T02:00:00Z", --maintenance-window-end "2024-02-03T06:00:00Z", and --maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA"

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud commands for Q1, Q2, and Q3 code freezes with proper date ranges (approximately 20 days each, well within the 30-day limit)

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Response includes a specific gcloud command for the November audit exclusion covering the entire month (November 1-30, 2024)

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states '"No upgrades" exclusions are limited to 30 days maximum' and provides chaining exclusions example for extended audit periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows or clarify that maintenance windows only affect auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response specifically recommends the Extended release channel and explains it provides 24-month support with the slowest upgrade cadence for maximum control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Response includes complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time parameters for all exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during long exclusion periods or mention version skew limitations
